title: Bundles of Brevity
description: A hastily made interpretation of the pale garden, from when its name was leaked.
body:
A Fabric mod that adds a... *unique* interpretation of the pale garden. This was made when it was assumed that the "Bundles of Bravery" drop would have the pale garden, which didn't end up being the case.

Adds pale blocks, the creaking (creature interpretation) and the creaking (door interpretation).
